title: Streamline request management with monday service
excerpt: Looking to manage internal and external requests more efficiently? Join our free webinar on Tuesday, November 19 at 16:00 CET to see how monday service helps teams centralize and automate request management across depart…

posts.author: larslodewijckx (Lars Lodewijckx)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looking to manage internal and external requests more efficiently? Join our free webinar on Tuesday, November 19 at 16:00 CET to see how monday service helps teams centralize and automate request management across departments.

We’ll show how you can use monday service to centralize incoming requests, automate repetitive tasks, and give stakeholders full visibility into progress — all while reducing response times and improving satisfaction.

Date: Tuesday, November 19
Time: 16:00–17:00 CET
Host: Xebia, platinum monday.com partner

Register here → Live Webinar: monday service | monday.com
